ankiCard.vocabHintDictionary: Recall the word meaning from the video context

update.found: New version v{{version}} found, current v{{current}}

help.title: Help
help.basic1: Upload video (.mp4 / .mkv / .avi) and subtitle file (.srt), or click "Generate Subtitles" for auto-transcription
help.basic2: Select target sentences, click "Start Processing" to generate cards
help.basic3: Preview cards, download .apkg file and import into Anki
help.advancedBasic1: Upload video and subtitles, manually select sentences to generate cards
help.advancedBasic2: Cards include: original text, audio clips, and video screenshots
help.advancedBasic3: Adjustable min duration, audio padding, and other parameters
help.advancedAi1: After configuring AI, use "AI Recommend" to intelligently select learning-worthy sentences
help.advancedAi2: AI automatically translates and generates vocabulary notes, cards include translations and study points
help.advancedAi3: Supports OpenAI / DeepSeek / Ollama and other compatible APIs
help.advancedAi4: Config auto-saved to browser, no need to re-enter after refresh
help.advancedSubtitle1: Upload .srt subtitle file, or upload video only and click "Generate Subtitles" for Whisper transcription
help.advancedSubtitle2: Whisper models: tiny / base / small / medium / large — larger is more accurate but slower
help.advancedSubtitle3: Transcription supports Chinese/English/Japanese and more, auto-detection by default
help.advancedCard1: Audio clips have +/-0.2s padding; audio track is extracted first for efficient slicing
help.advancedCard2: Supports preview with page navigation; import .apkg into Anki after download

step1.title: Prepare Materials
step1.ffmpegHelp: Video processing requires ffmpeg. Please install ffmpeg and add it to your system PATH.
step1.batchDropPrompt: Click or drag to add video & subtitle files
step1.batchDropHint: Supports selecting multiple files, auto-match subtitles by filename
step1.whisperModelHint: Select Whisper model (auto-download on first use)
step1.modelListFailed: Failed to fetch model list, does not affect usage
step1.subtitlesReadyGoNext: Subtitles ready, proceed to next step

step2.title: AI Screening
step2.excludeWordsPlaceholder: Comma separated, e.g.: oh, well, yeah
step2.screeningDone: Screening complete — {{count}} recommended. Confirm selection, then proceed to annotation.

step3.title: AI Annotation
step3.modeGrammarDesc: Focus on grammar structures, sentence patterns, practical expressions
step3.modeVocabDesc: Focus on word extraction, POS definitions, contextual memory
step3.annotatingHint: After annotation, you can preview cards and generate the deck

step4.title: Preview & Generate
step4.noAiNote: No AI annotation used — will generate basic cards (with original text, audio, screenshots; no translations/notes)

whisper.base: Fast, good enough for daily use

prompt.grammarScreenBody:
You are a {source_language} textbook editor. Evaluate each subtitle line for learning value:

Criteria:
- Has clear grammar points (tenses, clauses, subjunctive mood, etc.)
- Has practical expressions or fixed collocations
- Content is meaningful (not simple greetings like 'okay', 'yeah', 'uh-huh')
- Has cultural context or situational meaning
prompt.vocabScreenBody:
You are a {source_language} vocabulary teaching expert. Judge whether each subtitle is worth learning as vocabulary material:

Criteria:
- Contains high-frequency core vocabulary or academic words
- Contains valuable phrasal verbs, prepositional collocations, or idioms
- Contains examples of polysemy or uncommon word usage
- Words are easier to understand and memorize in context
- Content is meaningful (not simple greetings like 'okay', 'yeah', 'uh-huh')

For include=true items, the notes field should note: key word - part of speech - definition; mark phrases as a whole unit
prompt.grammarAnnotateBody:
You are a {source_language} textbook editor. Provide translations and grammar notes for the subtitle list (pre-screened for learning value).

Response format (strict):
{"items": [{"index": number, "translation": "{target_language} translation", "notes": "grammar points and practical expressions", "word": "the most valuable core word or phrase in the sentence", "definition": "{target_language} definition of the word/phrase"}]}

Notes:
- Must return a JSON object with items as an array
- All items must include translation, notes, word, definition
- notes should focus on grammar structure and practical expressions
- word should be the most valuable core word/phrase worth memorizing
- Keep output in original order
prompt.vocabAnnotateBody:
You are a {target_language} vocabulary teaching expert. Provide translations and vocabulary notes for the subtitle list (pre-screened for learning value).

Response format (strict):
{"items": [{"index": number, "translation": "{target_language} translation", "notes": "key word - POS - definition", "word": "the most valuable core word or phrase in the sentence", "definition": "{target_language} definition of the word/phrase"}]}

Notes:
- Must return a JSON object with items as an array
- All items must include translation, notes, word, definition
- notes format: key word - POS - definition; mark phrases as a whole
- word should be the most valuable core word/phrase worth memorizing
- Keep output in original order
